hero.title: Plan, Manage & Sell Tickets for Unforgettable Events
hero.description: Tike is your all-in-one event management platform. From online ticket sales to custom event apps, we help organizers deliver seamless experiences at every scale.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: End-to-end solutions to bring your events to life, from planning to the final applause.

items.title: Online Ticket Sales
items.description: Sell tickets effortlessly through our secure, branded storefront. Support for multiple ticket types, early-bird pricing, promo codes, and real-time sales analytics.

items.title: Event Management Software
items.description: Streamline every aspect of your event with powerful tools for scheduling, vendor coordination, budgeting, and team collaboration — all in one dashboard.

items.title: Art Fair Events
items.description: Specialized services for art fairs and cultural exhibitions. We handle gallery layouts, artist coordination, visitor flow management, and curated event experiences.

items.title: Custom Event Apps
items.description: Bespoke mobile and web apps for ticketing, live attendance monitoring, digital attendee credentials, interactive schedules, and real-time event notifications.

features.title: Why Choose Tike?
features.description: We combine deep event expertise with cutting-edge technology to make every event a success.

items.title: Real-Time Analytics
items.description: Track ticket sales, attendance, and revenue in real time with intuitive dashboards and detailed reports.

items.title: Seamless Check-In
items.description: Fast QR code and NFC-based check-in systems that eliminate queues and enhance the attendee experience.

items.title: Branded Experience
items.description: Customize your event pages, tickets, and apps with your own branding for a fully cohesive look and feel.

items.title: Scalable Infrastructure
items.description: Whether it's a 50-person workshop or a 50,000-seat festival, our platform scales to meet your needs.

items.title: Secure Payments
items.description: PCI-compliant payment processing with support for multiple currencies and payment methods worldwide.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: Our event specialists are available around the clock to help you plan, launch, and manage your events.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Hear from event organizers who trust Tike to deliver exceptional experiences.

items.quote: Tike transformed how we manage our annual art fair. The custom app for attendee credentials alone saved us countless hours and eliminated check-in bottlenecks.
We sold over 10,000 tickets in the first week using Tike's online sales platform. The real-time analytics gave us the confidence to scale our marketing efforts at the right time.
From venue logistics to digital ticketing, Tike's event management software keeps our entire team aligned. It's become an indispensable part of our workflow.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your Next Event?
cta.description: Join thousands of organizers who trust Tike to plan, manage, and sell tickets for events of every size.
